<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（10 個）：<ul>
<li>heparin cofactor 2 deficiency（100.0%）</li>
<li>factor 5 excess with spontaneous thrombosis（100.0%）</li>
<li>antithrombin deficiency type 2（100.0%）</li>
<li>thrombophilia（99.9%）</li>
<li>pediatric systemic lupus erythematosus（99.2%）</li>
<li>severe nonproliferative diabetic retinopathy（99.2%）</li>
<li>thrombophilia due to protein S deficiency, autosomal recessive（99.1%）</li>
<li>scleroderma (disease)（99.1%）</li>
<li>complement component 4a deficiency（99.0%）</li>
<li>pseudo-von Willebrand disease（99.0%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
